inputs.label: Opener Weight
inputs.businessContext: Your planned opening weight on the platform

inputs.label: Second Attempt Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of opener for second attempt

inputs.label: Third Attempt Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of opener for third attempt

inputs.label: Warm-up Start Percent
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of opener to start warm-up sets

inputs.label: Warm-up End Percent
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of opener for last warm-up set

inputs.label: Warm-up Step Percent
inputs.businessContext: Increment between warm-up sets as percentage of opener

formulas.breakdown: [`Opener: ${openerWeight}kg`, `Second Attempt: ${openerWeight * secondAttemptFactor / 100}kg`, `Third Attempt: ${openerWeight * thirdAttemptFactor / 100}kg`, ...(() => { const warmups = []; for (let p = warmUpStartPercent; p <= warmUpEndPercent; p += warmUpStepPercent) warmups.push(`Warm-up ${p}%: ${Math.round(openerWeight * p / 100)}kg`); return warmups; })()]
